opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Spent $55 — sofa looks brand new instead of $1,200 for a replacement
opportunities.before_state: Faded, pet-hair-covered sofa with visible stains making the living room look rundown
opportunities.after_state: Clean, tailored-looking sofa that anchors a fresh, company-ready living room
opportunities.why_now: Prime Day lands June 23-26 and BHG is already publishing early deal roundups, putting home-refresh shoppers in active buy mode right now.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products 3-piece outdoor bistro set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Under $230: empty concrete patio → summer entertaining retreat
opportunities.before_state: Bare, neglected patio slab with no seating — wasted outdoor square footage all summer
opportunities.after_state: Styled bistro setup ready for morning coffee, evening wine, and effortless hosting
opportunities.why_now: Real Simple is actively publishing backyard transformation content and Pinterest backyard-retreat pins are surging as peak outdoor living season begins in June.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm side sleeper pillow with U-shaped cutout
opportunities.transformation_hook: Woke up stiff every morning — $69 pillow fixed my neck in one night
opportunities.before_state: Flat, shapeless old pillow causing daily morning neck pain and poor sleep quality
opportunities.after_state: Proper cervical support, waking up pain-free with a bedroom that finally looks spa-worthy
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's wellness-at-home content push (backyard retreats, sleep-focused rooms) is lifting buyer intent for comfort upgrades across all bedroom categories heading into Prime Day.

opportunities.specific_product: Bedsure lightweight summer quilt with under-bed storage organizer
opportunities.transformation_hook: Under $65: chaotic dorm bedroom becomes a clean, aesthetic sleep space
opportunities.before_state: Cluttered, mismatched dorm room with a flat dingy comforter and zero usable storage
opportunities.after_state: Color-coordinated, organized bedroom that looks intentional and Pinterest-ready
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy is actively publishing IKEA college bedroom makeover content and back-to-school shopping starts in June, creating a rising wave of dorm transformation buyer intent.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia frozen drink and slushie maker set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Under $45: plain kitchen counter → summer party entertaining station
opportunities.before_state: Bare kitchen counter with no personality, serving plain drinks at summer gatherings
opportunities.after_state: Eye-catching frozen-drink setup that impresses guests and films beautifully for content
opportunities.why_now: The Ninja Slushi is going viral on Real Simple and Pinterest, validating frozen-at-home demand; Syruvia captures the same buyer intent at half the price with a 20% affiliate commission.
